title: When stopping containers locally, ensure cleanup runs
body:
The cleanup process was already running and ensuring that mounts and networking configuration was cleaned up on container stop, but this was async from the actual `podman stop` command which breaks some expectations - the container is still mounted at the end of `podman stop` and will be cleaned up soon, but not immediately. Fortunately, it's a trivial change to resolve this.

Fixes #5747
